final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing infographic for a technical tutorial on deploying Hermes inside a Docker container and integrating it with GLMCodingPlan.

Style/medium: clean flat vector infographic, modern technical documentation style, step-by-step visual guide
Subject: 4 numbered steps (1-2-3-4) showing Docker container setup and Hermes integration workflow with GLMCodingPlan
Composition: vertical layout with 4 distinct horizontal sections, each containing a step number badge, concise instruction text, and a simple diagram icon
Color palette: Docker blue as primary accent, neutral gray for secondary elements, white background for readability
Text (verbatim): "1", "2", "3", "4", "docker", "hermes", "glmcodingplan"
Constraints: must be readable at small sizes; icons must be simple and universally understood; text must be concise for each step
Avoid: cluttered layouts; overly complex diagrams; gradients unless essential; stock photo style; 3D rendering
